title: HTTP API Resources, Representations, Errors, and Handler Layers · Language Lens: Feed Go Method Status Contract

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-go-method-status-contract-irahrk(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_feed_go_method_status_contract_irahrk\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?operations < 8)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?consistentResponses != operations)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?canceledDependencies < 1)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?leakedInternals > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using apply and safe plus specific case evidence.
